policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="originalBodyString" value="@{ return context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true); }" />
        @{
            var assertionString = (string)context.Variables["originalBodyString"];
            var fiscalCode = (string)context.Variables["fiscalCode"];
            
            var newBody = new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject();
            newBody["fiscal_code"] = fiscalCode;
            newBody["assertion"] = assertionString;
            
            return newBody.ToString();
        }
